CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-15-2009 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Change In Order To Consolidate With Pending Santa Clara County Superior Court Action, Request For Costs And Attorneys' Fees
Off Calendar Nov-07-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANTS THE REITMAN GROUP, A PARTNERSHIP AND KURT REITMAN'S Motion To Change Venue In Order To Consolidate With Pending Santa Clara County Superior Court Action, Request For Costs And Attorneys' Fees.
RULING: No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling - The motion is granted. This is a mixed action case and venue is proper where defendant resides. Moreover, plaintiff and defendant agreed to venue the contract cause of action in Santa Clara County. Given the terms of the parties' agreement, and the applicable law, defendant is entitled to reasonable costs and attorneys' fees in bringing this motion. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER.) (302/PJM/PJM) Judge: Patrick J. Mahoney, Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR 8600
